# Fixture: benign-test-code-01.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
#[test]
fn test_constraint_evaluation_returns_pass() {
    let evaluator = Evaluator::new(default_config());
    let result = evaluator.evaluate("Hello world").unwrap();
    assert_eq!(result.verdict, Verdict::Pass);
    assert!(result.score > 0.8);
}
